UAE.name: United Arab Emirates
UAE.personal_income_tax_note: Zero personal income tax for individuals
UAE.corporate_tax_note: 9% on profits above AED 375,000 (from June 2023). Freezone companies may qualify for 0%
UAE.residency_notes: Or demonstrating center of vital interests in UAE
UAE.notable_for: Zero personal income tax, crypto-friendly, strong banking, golden visa program

CAYMAN.name: Cayman Islands
CAYMAN.notable_for: Absolute zero taxation, major financial center, no tax treaties (FATCA/CRS still apply)

MONACO.name: Monaco
MONACO.personal_income_tax_note: Zero for non-French nationals. French nationals still pay French taxes for first 5 years
MONACO.corporate_tax_note: 33.3% on profits from Monaco sources. 0% if >75% revenue from Monaco
MONACO.residency_notes: Must prove residency: lease/owned property, sufficient resources
MONACO.notable_for: Zero income tax, ultra-luxury lifestyle, limited residency availability, French nationals taxed differently

SINGAPORE.name: Singapore
SINGAPORE.capital_gains_tax_note: No CGT. But frequent trading can be reclassified as income
SINGAPORE.dividend_tax_note: One-tier tax system - dividends are tax-exempt in hands of shareholders
SINGAPORE.corporate_tax_note: 17% headline, effective rate lower with startup exemptions
SINGAPORE.crypto_tax_note: No CGT on crypto. But income from crypto trading taxable
SINGAPORE.notable_for: Territorial tax system, zero CGT, zero dividend tax, extensive treaty network, global financial hub

HONG_KONG.name: Hong Kong
HONG_KONG.personal_income_tax_note: Standard rate of 15% may apply if lower than progressive rates
HONG_KONG.notable_for: Territorial system, zero CGT, zero dividend tax, low flat rate, Asia financial hub

MALTA.name: Malta
MALTA.capital_gains_tax_note: On property and certain securities. Many exemptions available
MALTA.dividend_tax_note: Non-dom residents only taxed on Malta-source income and foreign remittances
MALTA.corporate_tax_note: 35% headline but shareholders receive 6/7 refund on distribution = effective 5%
MALTA.notable_for: EU member, non-dom regime, corporate refund system, citizenship by investment, Mediterranean lifestyle

CYPRUS.name: Cyprus
CYPRUS.capital_gains_tax_note: 20% on gains from Cyprus property only. No CGT on foreign securities
CYPRUS.dividend_tax_note: Non-dom residents exempt from SDC (special defence contribution) on dividends
CYPRUS.interest_tax_note: Non-dom residents exempt from SDC on interest
CYPRUS.sixty_day_rule_note: 60 days presence in Cyprus can establish tax residency for those not tax resident elsewhere
CYPRUS.notable_for: Low corporate tax, non-dom exempt from dividend/interest tax, 60-day residency rule, EU member, no inheritance tax

PORTUGAL.name: Portugal
PORTUGAL.inheritance_tax_note: 10% stamp duty on inheritance (exemptions for direct family)
PORTUGAL.ifici_note: Incentivo Fiscal à Capitalização e ao Investimento - 20% flat rate on eligible income
PORTUGAL.notable_for: IFICI regime (ex-NHR), Golden Visa, D7 passive income visa, EU member, high quality of life

IRELAND.name: Ireland
IRELAND.corporate_tax_note: 12.5% trading rate - one of lowest in EU
IRELAND.non_dom_note: Irish non-doms taxed on Irish source income and foreign remittances only
IRELAND.notable_for: 12.5% corporate tax, Non-Dom remittance basis, EU base for US multinationals, English-speaking

UK.name: United Kingdom
UK.capital_gains_tax_note: 18-24% on property, 10-24% on other assets from Oct 2024
UK.inheritance_tax_note: 40% on estates above £325k (or £500k with main residence relief)
UK.non_dom_note: Non-Dom regime abolished April 2025. New 4-year FIG (Foreign Income and Gains) regime
UK.fig_note: First 4 years of UK residency: foreign income/gains exempt
UK.notable_for: 130+ tax treaties, new 4-year FIG regime (replaced Non-Dom), major financial centre

GERMANY.name: Germany
GERMANY.solidarity_surcharge_note: 5.5% on income tax - applies to high earners only now
GERMANY.capital_gains_tax_note: 25% flat + 5.5% solidarity = 26.375%. Applies to shares, crypto, etc
GERMANY.crypto_holding_note: Crypto held >1 year is tax-free (per old rules, still applies to old holdings)
GERMANY.exit_tax_note: Exit tax on shares in companies >1% ownership held >7 years
GERMANY.notable_for: High taxes, exit tax traps, but stable economy. 1-year crypto exemption (old holdings)

FRANCE.name: France
FRANCE.capital_gains_tax_note: 30% flat (12.8% tax + 17.2% social) or progressive scale
FRANCE.wealth_tax_note: IFI (Impôt sur la Fortune Immobilière) - on real estate assets >EUR 1.3M
FRANCE.notable_for: Very high tax burden, wealth tax on real estate, strong treaty network

ITALY.name: Italy
ITALY.flat_tax_100k_note: EUR 100,000 flat tax per year on ALL foreign income for new residents - valid 15 years
ITALY.flat_tax_7pct_south_note: 7% flat tax on foreign income for retirees settling in southern Italian municipalities <20k inhabitants
ITALY.notable_for: EUR 100k flat tax for HNWI on foreign income, 7% for retirees in south, excellent lifestyle

SWITZERLAND.name: Switzerland
SWITZERLAND.personal_income_tax_note: Varies by canton. Total rate (federal+cantonal+municipal) ranges from 22% (Zug) to 45%+ (Geneva)
SWITZERLAND.capital_gains_tax_note: No CGT on private assets. Gains on frequent trading taxed as income
SWITZERLAND.dividend_tax_note: 35% withholding tax on Swiss dividends (refundable for residents)
SWITZERLAND.inheritance_tax_note: Varies by canton. Most cantons have 0% for direct descendants
SWITZERLAND.wealth_tax_note: 0.3-1% annually in most cantons on worldwide assets for residents
SWITZERLAND.lump_sum_note: Expenditure-based taxation for wealthy non-working foreigners. Min CHF 400k/year typically
SWITZERLAND.notable_for: Zero CGT, lump-sum taxation for wealthy foreigners, Zug canton has very low rates, stability

NETHERLANDS.name: Netherlands
NETHERLANDS.box_3_note: Investment income: deemed return of 6.04% on assets, taxed at 36% = effective ~2.17%
NETHERLANDS.capital_gains_tax_note: No direct CGT on private assets. Gains taxed under Box 3 system
NETHERLANDS.wealth_tax_note: Box 3 deemed return system effectively ~2.17% annual wealth tax
NETHERLANDS.thirty_pct_ruling_note: Expats can exclude 30% of salary from tax for 5 years (for qualifying workers)
NETHERLANDS.notable_for: 30% ruling for expats, strong financial sector, but effective wealth tax via Box 3

USA.name: United States of America
USA.state_tax_note: State income tax varies: 0% (TX, FL, NV, WA) to 13.3% (CA)
USA.capital_gains_tax_note: 0/15/20% + 3.8% NIIT for high earners = up to 23.8%
USA.inheritance_tax_note: 40% federal estate tax on estates >$13.61M (2024). Some states have lower thresholds
USA.citizenship_taxation_note: US TAXES CITIZENS WORLDWIDE REGARDLESS OF RESIDENCY - unique globally
USA.feie_note: Foreign Earned Income Exclusion: up to $126,500 (2024) for bona fide foreign residents
USA.exit_tax_note: Expatriation tax on unrealized gains upon renunciation. Mark-to-market on assets
USA.notable_for: WORLDWIDE taxation including citizens abroad. FATCA affects all US persons globally. Puerto Rico Act 60 for 0% CGT
USA.warning: US citizenship/green card creates worldwide tax obligation that follows you everywhere

CANADA.name: Canada
CANADA.capital_gains_tax_note: 50% inclusion rate (rising to 66.7% above $250k from 2024 budget). Effective: 16.7-26.7%
CANADA.inheritance_tax_note: No inheritance tax but deemed disposition at death triggers capital gains
CANADA.departure_tax_note: Deemed disposition of assets on departure from Canada
CANADA.notable_for: No inheritance tax, but departure tax on leaving. Combined rates up to 54%

AUSTRALIA.name: Australia
AUSTRALIA.capital_gains_tax_note: 50% discount for assets held >1 year. Effective 23.5% at top rate
AUSTRALIA.temporary_resident_note: Temporary residents taxed on Australian-source income only for up to 4 years
AUSTRALIA.notable_for: CGT discount for long-term holdings, no inheritance tax, temporary resident exemption

ISRAEL.name: Israel
ISRAEL.new_immigrant_note: OLEH CHADASH: 10-year exemption on ALL foreign income for new immigrants and returning residents after 10+ years abroad
ISRAEL.notable_for: 10-year total tax exemption on foreign income for new immigrants (Olim). No reporting required

GEORGIA.name: Georgia (Country)
GEORGIA.virtual_zone_note: 0% tax on IT services exported outside Georgia
GEORGIA.hnwi_note: HNWI status (income >200k GEL): flat 20% on Georgian source, territorial on foreign
GEORGIA.notable_for: Virtual Zone for IT companies (0% on exports), very low cost of living, growing digital nomad hub

ESTONIA.name: Estonia
ESTONIA.capital_gains_tax_note: Taxed as income. Investment account regime allows tax-free growth
ESTONIA.dividend_tax_note: 22% on distributed profits. Retained earnings not taxed
ESTONIA.corporate_tax_note: 22% on distributed profits only. 0% on retained/reinvested profits
ESTONIA.investment_account_note: Gains within investment account not taxed until withdrawal
ESTONIA.e_residency_note: E-residency does NOT create tax residency. No tax benefits for non-residents
ESTONIA.notable_for: Estonian corporate model (0% on retained profits), investment account regime, e-residency (not a tax solution)

PARAGUAY.name: Paraguay
PARAGUAY.personal_income_tax_note: 10% flat rate - one of world's lowest
PARAGUAY.residency_investment_note: Residency possible with small investment (~$5,000). Citizenship after 3 years
PARAGUAY.residency_days_note: No minimum days requirement once permanent residency granted
PARAGUAY.notable_for: 10% flat tax, territorial system, very easy residency, very low cost of living, no minimum stay

THAILAND.name: Thailand
THAILAND.capital_gains_tax_note: No CGT on securities. Property gains taxed
THAILAND.territorial_note: Foreign income only taxable if remitted to Thailand in same tax year (changing from 2024)
THAILAND.ltv_visa_note: Long-Term Resident Visa: 0.17% flat tax on foreign income or flat fees
THAILAND.notable_for: LTV visa with preferential tax, territorial system changing, popular digital nomad destination

PANAMA.name: Panama
PANAMA.territorial_note: Only Panama-sourced income taxed. Foreign income completely exempt
PANAMA.notable_for: Pure territorial tax system, USD currency, Friendly Nations Visa, Pensionado program

MALAYSIA.name: Malaysia
MALAYSIA.mm2h_note: Malaysia My Second Home visa - minimum conditions required
MALAYSIA.notable_for: Territorial tax, no dividend tax, zero CGT on securities, MM2H visa

GREECE.name: Greece
GREECE.flat_tax_100k_note: EUR 100,000 flat tax on ALL foreign income for HNWIs who invest EUR 500k+ in Greece
GREECE.notable_for: EUR 100k flat tax regime for HNWI similar to Italy, Golden Visa, EU member
